h12d17760g47f5g4e04g8d79ga95fa174cdf8: You're testing my patience. Leave, unless you want to see my other face.
h8a79f411gbc98g4455ga58fg1d17cfc0321d: Calm, Maggran. Give him a chance.
hfc5304c4gf8e3g4dbcgbfb7g104ed069b182: Calm, Maggran. Give her a chance.
h8e8ef417g597dg453ag9aecg9e17a8658b5a: You - step back. Go join the other tieflings.
h818bcf00g2602g4db8g9a81gf24c4e912677: You - step back. We'll not tolerate drow in here.
h6971b210g0d6eg4033ga56cg0bb6c8fc523b: Why? What's so special down here?
h22b57f93g8201g4f9dg9eadgb569dea46d56: It's forbidden to outsiders - Kagha's orders.
h10172bdag234eg42aagb284g3da7bd59566a: I'm not looking for trouble. Can't you just let me by?
hb13777abgefd0g48abg9f5eg2ccfc416aed7: No. And you'll find trouble all the same, unless you get out of my sight.
h6807686cgf49cg4d7eg87f1g8468ab29374d: I am a druid first, tiefling second. Allow me to enter and pay my respects.
h62743324g2c96g4a8cgaca8ga8820b77750d: I am a druid first, drow second. Allow me to enter and pay my respects.
h23d68de3g98f9g4fe3ga787g4630d841015e: I am a druid, same as yourself. Allow me to pass and pay my respects. Please.
hbcd826a5gf0f6g44ddg9a0eg62280823be2f: Druid or not, you're still an outsider to this place. Entry is forbidden.
h7c04ee90g3bafg4e69g8eeegbdb2d8ed8098: Stop! Another step and Maggran will tear you open like a sack of grain.
h294aada7ga639g4435gb36eg1de6adea8948: If it weren't for me, you'd be overrun by goblins by now. I'll go where I please.
hf621c679gfa6eg44c6g99d5g74993e61a6f6: Keep back. Force my hand, and I'll show you its claws.
h9ffd7adcg598dg4ed1gb7ffg680f21e62596: What...? Why would she allow one of them? I... I suppose so, yes.
h629de9bfge4f2g4114gaf68g8035ea13b9fd: You - apparently Kagha wants to see you. Go ahead.
h8774fbaag7d76g4f26g9e3eg8f68d7666e19: But a word of warning. One wrong move and every single animal here will tear you apart.
h0b3c2975g222eg42edg8683gc8b478e6fd82: No need for threats. Why can't I move around freely here?
h1e3e4a63g8968g4fb3gabd4gb91990a308b4: Stop! Move back at once. We'll not tolerate drow in our Grove.
